Emergency bilateral lower limb angioplasty including athrombectomy, balloon angioplasty, and catheter-directed thrombolysis (CDT)
 Tissue plasmin activator infusion at 0.5 mg/hour

 Oral antiplatelet therapy: aspirin and clopidogrel
 Stage II pharmaco-mechanical thrombolysis
 Intravenous hydration
 Oral anticoagulant therapy with warfarin 5 mg daily

Transfer to ICU for monitoring by a multidisciplinary team
 Downgrade to the regular surgical floor after condition stabilization
 Discharge from hospital
